action.reasoning: Observation: best remains 0.594 (iter16 with replay=500/task balanced post-task via meta+torch.where/randperm AFTER train, KD beta=0.5/T=2.0 using KLDiv(log_softmax(student/T)||softmax(teacher/T))*T**2, consol=5@1e-4 on full mem, Adam(5e-4/1e-5), per-task Cosine reset, dense logs every20steps+val/best per epoch, deepcopy old_model). Recent iters 17-27 all failed (~0.08-0.58) due to persistent train.py truncation (ends mid-train loop at labels.to(d; missing opt.zero_grad/step/scheduler/KD/full epochs/mem_update_AFTER_task/consol/best-tracking; late tasks random acc~0.03-0.04 loss~6, val~0.06). Curves confirm no post-task0 learning. Analysis: long train.py triggers workspace truncation in context/workspace; successful iter16 had COMPLETE code with all components (val~0.596 matching test, balanced task accs early~0.48/late~0.7-0.8). Root cause fixed by concise full rewrite. Decision: overwrite with COMPLETE concise non-truncated train.py exactly replicating iter16 success params (update mem AFTER task train only on current data, full KD only if task>0, per-epoch val+best on val.pt, final best ckpt with model_state_dict). Keep model.py/predict.py (robust loading/transforms). Run full train then submit_eval on checkpoint.pt to recover >=0.594 (target >0.60).
